core_mechanism: Simulation-based (likelihood-free) Bayesian inference: estimating a joint posterior over model parameters by comparing observed data to ensembles of forward-model simulations, so that an overlapping target signal is disentangled simultaneously from several superimposed background/foreground components and instrument noise.
brief_reason: The abstract states that a Simulation-based Inference package is used to perform a joint inference on the noise, foregrounds, and signal in order to reconstruct injected parameters, and quantifies how the added correlated backgrounds degrade the recoverable parameter precision.
